title: AI Arena submission
description: One model's output for a task. Lives at tasks/<task>/<submission>/submission.json. Add "$schema": "../../../schema/submission.schema.json" to your file for live editor validation.

$schema.description: Optional pointer to this schema for editor tooling.

provider.description: Model provider, e.g. anthropic, openai. Free-form and provider-neutral.

model.description: Human-readable model name shown on the card, e.g. "Fable 5".

modelId.description: Pricing key into data/pricing.json (e.g. claude-fable-5). Required for cost to be computed.

effort.description: Reasoning effort label (free-form): low, medium, high, xhigh, max, ...

client.description: Tool used to run the model, e.g. claude-code, codex. Unknown values still render (a build warning flags likely typos).

author.description: GitHub handle of the contributor (a valid handle becomes a profile link).

generatedAt.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of when the output was produced.

type.description: Media type. Defaults to the task's type when omitted.

path.description: iframe only: folder or index.html to load. Defaults to the submission folder's index.html.

src.description: Non-iframe media source (image/video/model-viewer). MUST NOT be set for iframe submissions — the gallery always loads the in-repo files.

poster.description: Optional poster image for video / model-viewer.

id.description: Stable submission id; defaults to the folder name.

metrics.description: Usage metrics. Every numeric field must be finite and non-negative. Extra fields are allowed but not validated.
